info.title: Warehouse Order Logistics Service API
info.description: REST API for warehouse order logistics including sales orders, shipments, loads, and shipping labels

tags.name: Carrier Rate Shopping
tags.description: APIs for comparing shipping rates across carriers

tags.name: Shipping Manifest Management
tags.description: Carrier manifest and pickup management APIs

post.description: Upload photo or document as proof of VAS task completion. Supports images (JPG, PNG) and PDF files up to 10MB.

post.description: Webhook endpoint for carriers to push tracking status updates. Updates shipment status in real-time.

post.summary: Generate shipping label for outbound shipment

get.summary: Get sales orders with pagination

post.summary: Sync order header status from line statuses
post.description: Derives header status from line execution reality (WMS principle)
Ships order after all lines picked and packed, transitions to SHIPPED
Releases order for picking, transitions lines ALLOCATED → RELEASED
Allocates inventory at line level, transitions lines CREATED → ALLOCATED

post.summary: Create a new sales order line

post.description: Begins picking task, transitions RELEASED → PICK_IN_PROGRESS (irreversible)

post.summary: Confirm pick completion with actual quantity
post.description: Completes pick, transitions to PICKED (full) or SHORT (partial)

post.summary: Create a new outbound shipment item

get.summary: Get all loads

post.summary: Get shipping rates from multiple carriers
post.description: Compare shipping costs and transit times across UPS, FedEx, USPS, and DHL. Returns cheapest and fastest options with detailed breakdown of costs.

get.summary: List all barcode label templates
get.description: Returns paginated list of label templates with filtering support

post.description: Creates a custom label template with field definitions
Send label print job to physical ZPL/EPL printer with template data

get.summary: Get all outbound shipments

post.description: Remove cartons from shipment and reset to PACKED status - allows shipment correction
Add packed cartons to an existing shipment - enables flexible shipment assembly

post.summary: Create shipment from existing packed LPNs
post.description: Manhattan WMS Phase 7: Physical-first approach - select packed cartons to create shipment

id.description: Unique identifier for the shipping label

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this shipping label belongs to

shipmentId.description: ID of the shipment this label is for

trackingNumber.description: Tracking number provided by the carrier

labelDataUrl.description: URL to access the label data file

serviceLevel.description: Service level for shipping (e.g., Ground, Express)

weight.description: Weight of the shipment in the specified unit

shippingCost.description: Cost of shipping for this label

currencyCode.description: Currency code for the shipping cost

status.description: Current status of the shipping label

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the label was generated

printedAt.description: Timestamp when the label was printed

appliedToShipmentAt.description: Timestamp when the label was applied to the shipment

carrierPickedUpAt.description: Timestamp when the carrier picked up the shipment

notes.description: Additional notes about the shipping label

ShippingLabel.description: Shipping label entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the shipment item

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this shipment item belongs to

shipmentId.description: ID of the outbound shipment this item belongs to

packingSlipItemId.description: ID of the corresponding packing slip item

productId.description: ID of the product being shipped

quantityShipped.description: Quantity of the product being shipped

uomId.description: ID of the unit of measure for the quantity

lotNumber.description: Lot number of the inventory being shipped

serialNumbersJson.description: JSON array of serial numbers for tracked items

containerId.description: ID of the container this item is packed in

notes.description: Additional notes about this shipment item

OutboundShipmentItem.description: Outbound shipment item entity for warehouse management

description.example: 4x6 inch product label with QR code

id.description: Unique identifier for the outbound shipment

facilityId.description: ID of the warehouse facility handling this shipment

description.description: Detailed description of the shipment contents
description.example: Electronics shipment containing laptops and accessories

orderId.description: Reference to the sales order this shipment belongs to

clientId.description: ID of the client/customer receiving the shipment

carrierId.description: ID of the carrier handling the shipment

serviceLevel.description: Service level for shipping (e.g., Standard, Express, Overnight)

shippedDate.description: Actual date when shipment was shipped

totalWeight.description: Total weight of the shipment in kg

totalVolume.description: Total volume of the shipment in cubic meters

numberOfPackages.description: Number of packages in the shipment

trackingUrl.description: URL to track the shipment online

loadId.description: Reference to the load this shipment is assigned to

driverName.description: Name of the driver handling this shipment

totalCartons.description: Total number of cartons in this shipment

id.description: Unique identifier for the load shipment

notes.description: Additional notes about the load shipment

signedBy.description: Name of person who received delivery

templateId.description: Label template ID to use for printing

copies.description: Number of label copies to print

additionalProperties.description: Dynamic data to populate label template fields

labelData.description: Dynamic data to populate label template fields

callbackUrl.description: Callback URL for print job status notifications

lpnIds.description: List of LPN IDs to include in shipment

items.description: List of LPN IDs to include in shipment

CreateShipmentFromLpnsRequest.description: Request to create shipment from existing packed LPNs

CreateShipmentFromLpnsResponse.description: Response after creating shipment from LPNs
